sample: Real historical final scores only: trusted out-of-sample team-run projections, 2022-2026 through available settled games

model_quality.target_variable: actual team runs scored = starter_runs_allowed + bullpen_runs_allowed from real final game logs
model_quality.split_method: chronological out-of-sample: train on seasons/dates before the test season/date; no random train/test split is used for reported metrics
model_quality.production_trusted_reason: real-results trusted backtest artifact is cleaner, but production trust is blocked until upstream data provenance is independently validated and missing pregame feeds are added
feature_quality_flags: starter_stuff_plus and starter_location_plus exist in the historical source but are neutral/default 100.0 in the current table, so they should not be described as validated pitcher-strength signal yet.
temp_f, wind_out_to_cf, and ump_runs_factor exist in the historical source but are neutral/default values in the current table, so historical weather/umpire signal is not validated yet.
park factors are available after model cleaning/remapping, but should remain separately audited before being described as complete venue coverage.
line_total, home_ml, and away_ml are used only for market benchmark diagnostics. Their timestamp/provenance is not fully audited as pregame, so they are not used as headline model features.

market_indicators.purpose: benchmark-only diagnostics and total-direction line comparison; not the headline team-run model metric
market_indicators.pregame_status: not fully timestamp-audited in the current historical file, so public claims must treat them as benchmark-only

model_quality.total_direction_method: projected_total = projected_home_runs + projected_away_runs; edge = projected_total - historical line_total; at abs(edge) >= threshold, over is graded against actual final total > line and under against actual final total < line, with equal totals counted as pushes
leakage_audit: Reported projection files are out-of-sample artifacts from the walk-forward pipeline.
run_accuracy.py project_season trains only on seasons earlier than the test season.
rolling_calibration.py and final selected projection artifacts use prior completed dates for calibration.
Final score, actual_runs, starter_runs_allowed, bullpen_runs_allowed, winner, and same-game outcome fields are labels/evaluation fields only in this report and are not used as prediction features.
Market-implied team runs are reported only as a benchmark where historical line_total and moneyline exist; they are not used as the public model headline.
This backtest report uses real settled actual_runs labels only and does not call simulation code.
known_limitations: Historical table still contains neutral/default Stuff+ and Location+ in places; treat those as weak inputs until real imports are added.
Weather and umpire coverage is incomplete in the historical table; live artifacts may have richer weather than older rows.
Trusted backtest excludes neutral/default columns from the trusted feature claim, but the legacy selected projection artifact may still carry them as constant no-signal columns.
Exact final scores are low-frequency outcomes; they should be presented as rounded score leans.
Market total/closing total can be a leakage risk if captured after first pitch; keep it benchmark-only unless timestamp provenance is audited.

interpretation: Use projected runs and final score as a score lean, not an exact-score promise.
The model beats simple prior league/team baselines on team-run MAE, but market-implied team totals remain stronger where available.
No betting ROI is claimed here because the report is restricted to real historical results and direction accuracy.
